title: Operation Varsity Blues
original_title: Operation Varsity Blues: The College Admissions Scandal
overview: An examination that goes beyond the celebrity-driven headlines and dives into the methods used by Rick Singer, the man at the center of the shocking 2019 college admissions scandal, to persuade his wealthy clients to cheat an educational system already designed to benefit the privileged.
